notes: I used leasehold/low-cost Bukit Jalil comps most similar to the subject and excluded rentals and room-only ads. The strongest live asking/auction evidence clusters around RM171k-RM240k for 645-750 sq ft units in Taman LTAT / PPR Kampung Muhibbah / Seri Ceria, which works out to roughly RM274-RM372 psf; scaling those to 592 sq ft supports about RM170k-RM220k, with a central estimate near RM190k (about RM322 psf). Project pages on iProperty and PropertyGuru also show Taman LTAT asking ranges around RM225k-RM280k and RM235k-RM270k, while the EdgeProp project page shows sold prices around RM289-RM335 psf (median RM305 psf). Note: some portal project pages label Taman LTAT tenure as freehold, but leasehold-specific listings and auctions in the same Bukit Jalil pocket were prioritized for valuation.
